description_long: This is a large, modern commercial airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The wings feature upward-angled winglets at their tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. The fuselage is primarily white with blue and teal accents, and the tail fin is decorated with a gradient blue pattern. Two large turbofan engines are mounted under the wings, and the landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage, with a tricycle configuration. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with a row of windows running along the sides for passengers.
description: A modern commercial airplane with swept-back low wings, underwing turbofan engines, and a blue-white color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with upward-angled winglets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue gradient tail fin, passenger windows, and underwing engines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail fin, horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right wing, engines, and the landing gear beneath the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear, all fixed and visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
